&amp; faqs</a>\n      <a   class=\"text-white text-decoration-none font-weight-bold px-3 py-2\"    href=\"https://mitocw.zendesk.com/hc/en-us/requests/new\"  >contact us</a>\n      <div    data-uuid=\"1487e968-912c-2837-a04b-33ec15ff40a0\"\n           href=\"/courses/5-73-quantum-mechanics-i-fall-2018/pages/calendar/\" >\n          Calendar\n        </a>\n      \n    </span>\n    \n class=\"course-nav-parent d-flex flex-direction-row align-items-center justify-content-between\">\n    <span class=\"course-nav-text-wrapper\">\n      \n        <a class=\"text-dark nav-link\"\n          data-uuid=\"0ef5a8a5-ad41-be4f-20f7-05adfe4dbad0\"\n           href=\"/courses/5-73-quantum-mechanics-i-fall-2018/pages/readings/\" >\n          Readings\n        </a>\n      \n    </span>\n    \n  </div>\n  \n  <span class=\"medium-and-below-only\"><hr/></span>\n  \n  <ul\n    class=\"course-nav-child-nav m-auto collapse\"\n    id=\"nav-container_desktop_0ef5a8a5-ad41-be4f-20f7-05adfe4dbad0\"\n    data-uuid=\"f44d9054-5342-af93-4e73-aaa4964ca565\"\n           href=\"/courses/5-73-quantum-mechanics-i-fall-2018/pages/lecture-notes/\" >\n          Lecture Notes\n        </a>\n      \n id=\"nav-container_desktop_f44d9054-5342-af93-4e73-aaa4964ca565\"\n    aria-labelledby=\"nav-button_desktop_f44d9054-5342-af93-4e73-aaa4964ca565\"\n  >\n    \n  </ul>\n</li>\n\n    \n      \n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n<li class=\"course-nav-list-item\">\n  <div class=\"course-nav-parent d-flex flex-direction-row align-items-center justify-content-between\">\n    <span class=\"medium-and-below-only\"><hr/></span>\n  \n  <ul\n    class=\"course-nav-child-nav m-auto collapse\"\n    id=\"nav-container_desktop_136e2140-f302-5012-5bff-af027e02b772\"\n class=\"course-nav-parent d-flex flex-direction-row align-items-center justify-content-between\">\n    <span class=\"course-nav-text-wrapper\">\n      \n        <a class=\"text-dark nav-link\"\n          data-uuid=\"a72c23bf-10d3-fac1-556b-86be25ceb05a\"\n           href=\"/courses/5-73-quantum-mechanics-i-fall-2018/pages/quizzes/\" >\n          Exams &amp; Quizzes\n        </a>\n      \n    </span>\n    \n  </div>\n  \n  <span class=\"medium-and-below-only\"><hr/></span>\n  \n  <ul\n    class=\"course-nav-child-nav m-auto collapse\"\n    id=\"nav-container_desktop_a72c23bf-10d3-fac1-556b-86be25ceb05a\"\n    aria-labelledby=\"nav-button_desktop_a72c23bf-10d3-fac1-556b-86be25ceb05a\"\n  >\n    \n  </ul>\n</li>\n\n    \n  </ul>\n</nav>\n\n  </div>\n</div>\n\n        </div>\n        <div class=\"col-sm-12 col-lg-10 course-home-grid\">\n          <div class=\"\">\n            <div class=\"card\">\n              <div class=\"d-flex justify-content-between\">\n                <div class=\"p-0 col-lg-9\" id=\"main-course-section\">\n                  <div class=\"card-body\">\n                    \n<div class=\"mb-2\">\n  <header>\n  <div class=\"course-section-title-container\">\n    <div id=\"course-title\">\n      \n      <h2 class=\"pb-1 mb-1\">Syllabus</h2>\n    </div>\n  </div>\n</header>\n\n  <article class=\"content pt-3 mt-1\">\n    <main id=\"course-content-section\">\n    <h3 id=\"course-meeting-times\">Course Meeting Times</h3>\n\n<p>Lectures: 3 sessions / week, 1 hour / session</p>\n<p>Recitations: 1 session / week, 1 hour / session</p>\n\n    <h3 id=\"prerequisites\">Prerequisites</h3>\n\n<p>The prerequisites for this course are:</p>\n<p><a href=\"/courses/8-03sc-physics-iii-vibrations-and-waves-fall-2016\"><em>8.03 Physics III: Vibrations and Waves</em></a>, <a href=\"/courses/18-03sc-differential-equations-fall-2011\"><em>18.03 Differential Equations</em></a>, and <a href=\"/courses/5-61-physical-chemistry-fall-2017\"><em>5.61 Physical Chemistry</em></a>.</p>\n<p>Professor Field’s Fall 2017 version of this <em>5.61 Physical Chemistry</em> includes a full set of video lectures and lecture notes.</p>\n\n    <h3 id=\"course-description\">Course Description</h3>\n\n<p>This is a course for users, rather than admirers, of quantum mechanics. It will wind its way, with a minimum of elegance and philosophical correctness, through a progression of increasingly complex (mostly) time-independent problems.</p>\n<p>We will begin with one-dimensional problems, treated in the Schrödinger Ψ(x) wavefunction picture. Then Dirac&rsquo;s bra-ket notation will be introduced and we will switch permanently to Heisenberg&rsquo;s matrix mechanics picture. In matrix mechanics all information resides in a collection of numbers called “matrix elements” and all sorts of trickery will be developed to find ways of deriving the values of all matrix elements without ever actually evaluating any integrals! One should never underestimate the importance of perturbation theory. Armed with matrices, we will turn to 3-D central force (spherical symmetry) problems, and discover that for all spherical systems (atoms), the angular factors of all matrix elements are trivially evaluable without approximation. Key topics are commutation rule definitions of scalar, vector, and spherical tensor operators, the Wigner-Eckart theorem, and 3j (Clebsch-Gordan) coefficients. Finally, we deal with many-body systems, exemplified by many-electron atoms (“electronic structure”), anharmonically coupled harmonic oscillators (“intramolecular vibrational redistribution: IVR”), and periodic solids.</p>\n\n    <h3 id=\"textbooks\">Textbooks</h3>\n\n<p>Cohen-Tannoudji, C., B. Diu, and F. Laloë. <em>Quantum Mechanics</em>. Vol. 1. Wiley-VCH, 1st edition, 1992. ISBN: 9780471569527.</p>\n<p>Cohen-Tannoudji, C., B. Diu, and F. Laloë. <em>Quantum Mechanics</em>. Vol. 2. Wiley-VCH, 1st edition, 1991. ISBN: 9780471164357.</p>\n<p>The point of view of the text is quite different from the lectures (the text is more elegant, analytical, and logical). Reading assignments are intended to complement the lectures. Most homework, but few exam problems, will be based on the text. Additional reading material will be handed out in class.</p>\n\n    <h3 id=\"other-books\">Other Books</h3>\n\n<p>Field, Robert W. <em>Spectra and Dynamics of Small Molecules: Alexander Von Humboldt Lectures</em>. Springer, 2015. ISBN: 9783319159577.</p>\n<p>Tinkham, Michael. <em>Group Theory and Quantum Mechanics</em>. Dover Publications, 2003. ISBN: 9780486432472.</p>\n<p>Golding, R.M. <em>Applied Wave Mechanics</em>. Van Nostrand, 1969. ISBN: 9780442027469.</p>\n<p>Condon, Edward Uhler, and George Shortley. <em>The Theory of Atomic Spectra</em>. Cambridge University Press, 1935.  ISBN: 9780521092098.</p>\n<p>Karplus, Martin, and Richard N. Porter. <em>Atoms and Molecules</em>. Addison-Wesley, 1970. ISBN: 9780805352184.</p>\n<p>Baym, Gordon. <em>Lectures on Quantum Mechanics</em>. Benjamin Cummings Publishing Company, 1969. ISBN: 9780805306675.</p>\n\n    <h3 id=\"assignments\">Assignments</h3>\n\n\n    <h4 id=\"problem-sets\">Problem Sets</h4>\n\n<p>There will be ten weekly problem sets, which should be handed in at the start of class on the specified due date and will be graded.</p>\n\n    <h4 id=\"exams\">Exams</h4>\n\n<p>There will be two take-home, open-book exams. A key difference between problems and the exams is that out-of-class discussion of the problems, but not of the exams, is expected. </p>\n\n    <h3 id=\"grading\">Grading</h3>\n\n<p><table>\n<thead>\n<tr>\n<th>\n\nactivities\n</th>\n<th>\n\npercentages\n</th>\n</tr>\n</thead>\n<tbody>\n<tr>\n<td>\n\nHomework (weekly problem sets)\n</td>\n<td>\n\n30%\n</td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td>\n\nMid-Term Exam (open-book, take-home)\n</td>\n<td>\n\n30%\n</td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td>\n\nFinal Exam (open-book, take-home)\n</td>\n<td>\n\n40%\n</td>\n</tr>\n</tbody>\n</table>\n</p>\n</main>\n  </article>\n</div>\n\n\n                  </div>\n                </div>\n                \n                  <button   \n\n<div class=\"course-info\">\n  <div class=\"course-detail-title bg-light-gray\">\n    <h2 class=\"font-black py-1 pl-3 m-0\">\n      Course Info\n    </h2>\n  </div>\n  <div class=\"px-3 materials\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t</div>\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t<div>\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tFreely sharing knowledge with learners and educators around the world. <a href='/about'>Learn more</a>\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t</div>\n\t\t\t\t\t\t</div>\n\t\t\t\t\t</div>\n            \t</div>\n\t\t\t\t<div class=\"col-12 col-md-4 px-0 d-none d-md-block\">\n\t\t\t\t\t<div class=\"d-flex Massachusetts Institute of Technology\n\t\t</div>\n    \n\n\n    \n    <script src=\"/static_shared/js/common.c6351.js\"></script>\n    \n\n    \n    <script src=\"/static_shared/js/course_v2.c6351.js\"></script>\n    \n\n\n\n\n\n    \n<script async src=\"https://w.appzi.io/w.js?token=Tgs1d\"></script>\n\n\t</div>\n</div>\n\n  </div>\n  <script>\nfunction hideLinksOffline(){\n  if (!window.navigator.onLine) {\n    const stripLinks = document.querySelectorAll(\".strip-link-offline\")\n    const hideOffline = document.querySelectorAll(\".hide-offline\")\n    const showOffline = document.querySelectorAll(\".show-offline\")\n    Array.prototype.forEach.call(stripLinks, function(link) {\n      link.outerHTML = link.innerHTML\n    })\n    Array.prototype.forEach.call(hideOffline, function(link) {\n      link.classList.add(\"d-none\")\n    })\n    Array.prototype.forEach.call(showOffline, function(link) {\n      link.classList.remove(\"d-none\")\n    })\n  }\n}\nhideLinksOffline()\n</script>\n\n  \n\n<div\n  class=\"modal\"\n  id=\"external-link-modal\"\n  tabindex=\"-1\"\n  role=\"dialog\"\n  aria-labelledby=\"external-link-modal-title\"\n  aria-hidden=\"true\"\n>\n  <div class=\"modal-dialog modal-dialog-centered\" role=\"document\">\n    <div class=\"modal-content p-3\">\n      <div class=\"modal-header d-flex align-items-center\">\n        <div class=\"d-flex align-items-center\">\n          <img\n            class=\"modal-header-icon-img mr-3 align-baseline\"\n            src=\"/static_shared/images/external_link.58bbdd86c00a2c146c36.svg\"\n            alt=\"\"\n            aria-hidden=\"true\"\n          />\n          <h1 class=\"modal-title\" id=\"external-link-modal-title\">\n            You are leaving MIT OpenCourseWare\n          </h1>\n        </div>\n        <button type=\"button\" class=\"border-0 p-0 bg-transparent d-flex\" data-dismiss=\"modal\" aria-label=\"Close\">\n          <span aria-hidden=\"true\" class=\"material-icons modal-header-icon\">close</span>\n        </button>\n      </div>\n      <div class=\"modal-body\">\n        Please be advised that external sites may have terms and conditions, \n        including license rights, that differ from ours. MIT OCW is not responsible \n        for any content on third party sites, nor does a link suggest an endorsement \n        of those sites and/or their content.\n      </div>\n      <div class=\"modal-footer\">\n        <button\n          type=\"button\"\n          class=\"btn btn-outline-primary btn-link link-button\"\n          data-dismiss=\"modal\"\n          >\n            Stay Here\n        </button>\n        <a\n          role=\"button\"\n          class=\"btn btn-primary btn-continue\"\n          target=\"_blank\"\n          href=\"#\"\n        >\n          Continue\n        </a>\n      </div>\n    </div>\n  </div>\n</div>\n\n  <script>\n    \n    \n    \n    \n    \n    \n    'use strict';\n    const COURSE_DRAWER_LOCAL_STORAGE_KEY = \"desktopCourseDrawerState\"\n    const COURSE_DRAWER_OPENED = \"opened\"\n    const COURSE_DRAWER_CLOSED = \"closed\"\n    \n    const DESKTOP_COURSE_DRAWER_ID = \"desktop-course-drawer\"\n    const COURSE_DRAWER_BTN_ID = \"desktop-course-drawer-button\"\n    const MAIN_COURSE_SECTION_ID = \"main-course-section\"\n\n    try{\n\n      \n\n      function initializeDesktopCourseDrawerState() {\n        const state = getLocalStorageItem(COURSE_DRAWER_LOCAL_STORAGE_KEY)\n        if (state === null) {\n          \n          setLocalStorageItem(COURSE_DRAWER_LOCAL_STORAGE_KEY, COURSE_DRAWER_OPENED)\n          showOrHideDesktopCourseDrawer(COURSE_DRAWER_OPENED)\n        } else {\n          showOrHideDesktopCourseDrawer(state)\n        }\n\n        document.addEventListener(\"DOMContentLoaded\", () => {\n          const drawer = $(`#${DESKTOP_COURSE_DRAWER_ID}`)\n          const mainSection = $(`#${MAIN_COURSE_SECTION_ID}`)\n\n          drawer.on(\"shown.bs.collapse\", (event) => {\n            if (event.target.id !== DESKTOP_COURSE_DRAWER_ID) {\n              return;\n            }\n            mainSection.addClass(\"col-lg-9\")\n            mainSection.removeClass(\"col-12\")\n            setLocalStorageItem(COURSE_DRAWER_LOCAL_STORAGE_KEY, COURSE_DRAWER_OPENED)\n          })\n      \n          drawer.on(\"hidden.bs.collapse\", (event) => {\n            if (event.target.id !== DESKTOP_COURSE_DRAWER_ID) {\n              return;\n            }\n            mainSection.addClass(\"col-12\")\n            mainSection.removeClass(\"col-lg-9\")\n            setLocalStorageItem(COURSE_DRAWER_LOCAL_STORAGE_KEY, COURSE_DRAWER_CLOSED)\n          })\n        })\n      }\n\n      function showOrHideDesktopCourseDrawer(state) {\n        const drawer = document.getElementById(DESKTOP_COURSE_DRAWER_ID)\n        const button = document.getElementById(COURSE_DRAWER_BTN_ID)\n        const mainSection = document.getElementById(MAIN_COURSE_SECTION_ID)\n\n        if (state === COURSE_DRAWER_OPENED) {\n          drawer.classList.add(\"show\")\n          button.setAttribute(\"aria-expanded\", \"true\")\n        } else {\n          drawer.classList.remove(\"show\")\n          button.setAttribute(\"aria-expanded\", \"false\")\n          mainSection.classList.remove(\"col-lg-9\")\n          mainSection.classList.add(\"col-12\")\n        }\n      }\n\n      function setOrGetLocalStorageItem(action,key,value) {\n        try {\n          \n          if (typeof Storage !== \"undefined\") {\n            if (action === \"set\") {\n              localStorage.setItem(key, value)\n              return true\n            } else {\n              return localStorage.getItem(key)\n            }\n          }\n          console.error(\"This browser has no web storage support.\")\n          return null\n        } catch (e) {\n          console.error(\"An exception occurred while storing/fetching data in/from localstorage: \", e)\n          return null\n        }\n      }\n\n      function setLocalStorageItem(key, value) {\n        return setOrGetLocalStorageItem(\"set\", key, value)\n      }\n      \n      function getLocalStorageItem(key){\n        return setOrGetLocalStorageItem(\"get\", key)\n      }\n\n      initializeDesktopCourseDrawerState();\n    }\n    catch(e){\n      console.error(\"Something went wrong in maintaining/toggling course drawer state\", e)\n    }\n  </script>\n\n  \n\n<script>\nfunction expandNav(e,t){t.classList.add(\"show\"),e.querySelector(\".course-nav-section-toggle, video-tab-toggle-section\").setAttribute(\"aria-expanded\",\"true\")}function courseNav(){document.querySelectorAll(\".course-nav, .transcript-header\").forEach(e=>{e.querySelectorAll(\".nav-link\").forEach(e=>{const t=e.getAttribute(\"href\")?e.getAttribute(\"href\"):\"\";if(t.replace(/\\/$/,\"\")===window.location.pathname.replace(/\\/$/,\"\")){e.classList.add(\"active\");const s=e.closest(\".course-nav-parent\");s?.classList.add(\"active\");const o=e.dataset.uuid,t=e.closest(\".course-nav-list-item\"),n=t?.querySelector(\".collapse\"),i=Array.prototype.filter.call(document.querySelectorAll(\".course-nav-section-toggle\"),e=>e.dataset.uuid===o);t&&n&&i.length>0&&expandNav(t,n)}});const t=e.querySelector(\"a.nav-link.active\");e.querySelectorAll(\".course-nav-list-item\").forEach(e=>{const n=e.querySelector(\".collapse\");n&&n.contains(t)&&expandNav(e,n)})})}courseNav()\n</script>\n\n  \n\n<script>\n(()=>{var e=()=>document.querySelectorAll(\"#course-content-section table\"),t=()=>document.getElementById(\"course-content-section\");function n(){const o=e(),n=t();if(!n)return;if(!window.ResizeObserver)return;const i=new ResizeObserver(()=>s());i.observe(n),o.forEach(e=>{const t=e.getElementsByTagName(\"th\"),n=e.querySelectorAll(\"table tr\");n.forEach(e=>{const n=e.querySelectorAll(\"td\");n.forEach((e,s)=>{t.length>=s+1&&(n[s].dataset.title=t[s].innerText.trim().concat(\": \"))})})})}function s(){const s=e(),n=t();if(!n)return;s.forEach(e=>{const t=n.getBoundingClientRect(),o=+(e.dataset.minWidth??0);t.width>o&&e.classList.remove(\"mobile-table\");const s=e.getBoundingClientRect();s.right>t.right&&(e.dataset.minWidth=`${s.width}`,e.classList.add(\"mobile-table\"))})}n()})()\n</script>\n\n</body>\n\n</html>\n"}
